{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321120136F940B730857A6306648C"}"},"total":116},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7605291724162548542","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然内容较少，但目前比较有趣的，并且没太大的毒点"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770751473,"group_id":"7601729892991912984","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"为了凑够十个字我也真的是","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9Ga2w7otDOr3CxoV8DgAPIg+Atwsgkymzuj32o4XHVE","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2524953631263772","user_name":"大城池的凯特"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2524953631263772","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601729892991912984","book_info":{"abstract":"【综漫】+【多女主】+【fate】+【败犬女主】+【JOJO】+【魔法少女】+【辉夜】+【少女乐队】+【咒术回战】+【奥特曼】+【怪兽娘】+【喰种】+【电锯人】+【一拳】……
罗维满怀期待地进入了全潜行游戏《日在霓虹》，却在开局发现了一个致命BUG——
【退出键】居然被那个雌小鬼上帝给扣了？！
好消息：开局面板拉满，还是人类极限。
坏消息：这是个融合了咒灵、恶魔、外星人的高危综漫世界！
不过问题不大，既来之则安之。
……
……
罗维手持千兆战斗仪，拥有俺寻思之力后，画风开始逐渐离谱：
开局一顿牛肉饭，拐走骑士王Saber当保镖；
和五条悟勾肩搭背，顺手把咒术高层物理超度；
四宫辉夜：原来我家是外星人？那我也是？
高松灯：维，你说过要一辈子在一起的。
舞缇娜：魔法少女什么的最棒了。
看着身后那一群这不科学的“怪兽娘”和美少女们，罗维摊手：“我真的只是个普通的心理老师，请不要对我的‘物理修正拳’感到惊讶。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dd0b75f35752b1d72fb151eaee2283cb","author":"我的神之才能","author_id":"","book_id":"7601729892991912984","book_name":"综漫：抱歉，但我真的是救世英雄","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#306048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7602818642765414936","read_count":"32159","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"351677"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.1","serial_count":"162","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,多女主,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f92eabf3ec810fa236fe0ae14f9d49c5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779249696&x-signature=rGT7NgnuLrchvaY0mSkbKwxO1%2FE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3430930304998055","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"21"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321120136F940B730857A6306648C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读35分钟后点评
